steps.action: Inspect shared/schema.ts and migration for contacts.last_synced_at
steps.observed: Column exists but is timestamp (without timezone) in schema and migration.

assertions.issues: Type mismatch vs contract: expected TIMESTAMPTZ, found timestamp for contacts.last_synced_at.

steps.expected: UUID PK/FKs and TIMESTAMPTZ columns as specified
steps.observed: Table exists with required column names, but id/user_id/contact_id/trigger_interaction_id are varchar and time columns are timestamp.

steps.expected: Migration aligns with required schema types
steps.observed: 0005_lowly_dormammu.sql creates varchar IDs and timestamp columns.

assertions.issues: Schema type mismatch vs contract (UUID/TIMESTAMPTZ expected, varchar/timestamp found).

steps.expected: InsertAction, Action, InsertDraftsLog, DraftsLog and insert schemas exported
steps.observed: All required types and schemas are exported.

steps.action: Inspect actions indexes in schema and migration
steps.observed: Both indexes are present in shared/schema.ts and 0005_lowly_dormammu.sql.

steps.expected: UUID PK/FKs and TIMESTAMPTZ created_at per contract
steps.observed: Table exists with required column names, but id/user_id/contact_id/action_id are varchar and created_at is timestamp.
0005_lowly_dormammu.sql creates varchar IDs and timestamp created_at.

assertions.issues: Schema type mismatch vs contract (UUID/TIMESTAMPTZ expected, varchar/timestamp found).

steps.observed: Multiple similarly-scoped files exist, including both 0005_lowly_dormammu.sql and 0005_relationship_os_triggers.sql (plus duplicated 0003 numbering).

steps.expected: No modification of existing migration files

assertions.issues: Contract requires a single new Phase 2 migration file; repository currently has multiple 0005 migration files.

steps.expected: LangGraph createReactAgent + ChatAnthropic model claude-sonnet-4-20250514 + TODO MCP adapters
steps.observed: All required skeleton elements are present; tool adapters are placeholder TODO implementations.

steps.expected: Fully typed interfaces for list_email/get_email_thread/draft_email, list_meetings/get_meetings, gcal_list_events matching PRD contracts
steps.observed: Data interfaces exist, but no draft_email tool adapter/interface is implemented; calendar tool is list_events not gcal_list_events; tool/input field naming differs from PRD contract naming.

assertions.issues: MCP interface/tool coverage and contract naming are not fully aligned with the stated PRD interface set.

steps.action: Inspect MCP tool adapters in server/agent/tools/*.ts
steps.expected: Adapters use tool() with Zod schemas and TODO bodies
steps.observed: All existing adapters are implemented with tool() and schema: z.object(...), and include TODO placeholder behavior.

steps.action: Inspect agent setup for tracing env usage
steps.expected: Agent setup reads LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2, LANGCHAIN_API_KEY, LANGCHAIN_PROJECT from env vars with no hardcoded keys
steps.observed: Only a comment references these vars in server/agent/index.ts; no explicit runtime env read/configuration for these tracing vars was found in agent setup.

assertions.issues: Tracing env var configuration is not explicitly implemented in agent setup code (only documented in comments).

steps.expected: Contains ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, LANGSMITH_API_KEY, LANGSMITH_PROJECT, LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2, SUPERHUMAN_MCP_URL, GRANOLA_MCP_URL, GCAL_MCP_URL
steps.observed: All required env vars are present in .env.example.

frictions.description: PowerShell variable interpolation/escaping in this execution environment caused initial command-capture attempts to fail.
frictions.resolution: Used python3 subprocess wrappers to run npm check and persist terminal output to mission evidence files.
